programs.title: This Morning
programs.desc: Magazine show with news and topical items, celebrity guests, expert advice, real-life stories, competitions and a mix of cookery, health, beauty, lifestyle and more.

programs.title: Loose Women
programs.desc: Join the Loose Women panellists as they interview celebrity guests and discuss the day's most topical issues, from current affairs to celebrity gossip and the latest showbiz news.

programs.title: ITV Lunchtime News
programs.desc: The latest headlines from around the world at lunchtime with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents, all of which are followed by a national weather forecast.

programs.title: ITV News London
programs.desc: The latest news and weather from London and the South East.

programs.title: Dickinson's Real Deal
programs.desc: There's a right carry-on in Hartlepool this time. James is left red faced trying to buy some saucy film posters, Karen enjoys a serenade and the Duke stitches Hoggy up.

programs.title: Lingo
programs.desc: This edition's teams are London pals Saffron and Marcel and two mother-daughter pairs - Beth and Margaret from Aberfeldy and Liverpool, and Stephanie and Catherine from Northwich.
